playbook.scope: All cron and scheduled jobs (k8s CronJob, GHA scheduled, Airflow / cloud scheduler) are inventoried; orphan / failing / silently-skipping jobs are flagged and assigned owners.

success-criteria.criterion: All cron and scheduled jobs (k8s CronJob, GHA scheduled, Airflow / cloud scheduler) are inventoried; orphan / failing / silently-skipping jobs are flagged and assigned owners
Decision gates passed at every stage with written rationale
Outputs of each stage filed in the canonical location for the team

stage.name: Prepare
stage.intent: Achieve the 'prepare' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the prepare work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during prepare

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the prepare outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Execute
stage.intent: Achieve the 'execute' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the execute work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during execute

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the execute outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Verify
stage.intent: Achieve the 'verify' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the verify work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during verify

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the verify outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Document
stage.intent: Achieve the 'document' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the document work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during document

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the document outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Decide
stage.intent: Achieve the 'decide' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the decide work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during decide

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the decide outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content cron-scheduled-job-audit-monthly --format md, agent: faion get-content cron-scheduled-job-audit-monthly --format context, json: faion get-content cron-scheduled-job-audit-monthly --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for chunk-07 role-devops-engineer playbook}]
